TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Dead Nations Faction.

Translations.Comment: Direct compound. Evokes the undead kingdoms rising from ancient graves.
Zombie is universally recognized. Shambling undead hordes.
Gruft = crypt/tomb. Garde = guard. Elite undead warriors guarding ancient tombs.
Skeletal spear-wielding troops. Disciplined undead formations.
Ausgegraben = unearthed/excavated. Ancient siege weapon raised from the dead.
Schattenwölfe (shadow wolves) conveys the supernatural, cursed nature. Alternative: Grimmwölfe.
Undead cavalry. Former knights now serving in death.
Schrecken = dread/terror. Elite undead knights radiating fear.
Grausig = fell/dreadful. Fledermaus = bat. Monstrous flying creatures.
Compound of zombie and giant. Massive reanimated corpse.
Direct compound. Terrifying undead dragon of pure bone.
Gruft = crypt, Herr = lord. Ancient undead noble commanding the armies.
Vampir = vampire. Undead knight with vampiric powers.
Standard German term for necromancer. Master of death magic.
